summary: The user, a senior software engineer who was promoted three months ago, is planning to launch a new product feature in June and seeks assistance in creating a project timeline and Gantt chart. They decide to use Asana for project management and plan to include a junior engineer, Alex, in a team meeting to discuss project goals and task assignments.
facts: The user was promoted to a senior software engineer position three months ago and leads a team of five engineers. The user plans to launch a new product feature in June. The user completed a high-priority project two months ahead of schedule, which led to a significant increase in company revenue. The user has decided to use Asana for creating a Gantt chart for project management. The user intends to organize a meeting with their team to discuss the project plan and assign tasks. The user plans to prepare junior engineer Alex beforehand and assign him the role of taking notes during the meeting. The user will cover the project's goals and objectives at the beginning of the meeting to ensure team alignment.
